title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Jones Lang LaSalle

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Jones Lang LaSalle
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
